description:
compile_fn takes 23 parameters. lower_prim takes 13. Ten are shared between them.
After T1 (fns_needing_host_ctx removed) and T2 (stub_fn_ids removed), bundle the shared params.

ADD (before compile_fn):
  struct CodegenEnv<'a> {
      runtime: &'a RuntimeRefs,
      module: &'a fz_ir::Module,
      fn_types: &'a FnTypes,
      spec_registry: &'a SpecRegistry,
      fn_ids: &'a HashMap<u32, FuncId>,
      tuple_schema_ids: &'a HashMap<usize, u32>,
      param_reprs: &'a [Vec<ArgRepr>],
      return_reprs: &'a [ArgRepr],
      natively_callable: &'a HashSet<FnId>,
      cont_target_fns: &'a HashSet<FnId>,
      cont_fns: &'a HashSet<FnId>,
      closure_n_captures: &'a HashMap<FnId, usize>,
  }

NOTE: jmod is &mut M (generic mutable ref) — leave it as a separate parameter on compile_fn
and lower_prim since it cannot be stored in a shared-ref struct alongside other &mut borrows.

UPDATE compile_fn signature: replace the 12 bundled params with env: &CodegenEnv<'_>
UPDATE lower_prim signature: same
UPDATE all call sites in compile_with_backend
UPDATE all internal references: env.runtime, env.module, etc.

compile_fn goes from 23 params to ~11. lower_prim from 13 to ~5.

cargo build must produce zero warnings. All tests must pass.
title: fz-cg2.6 CodegenEnv: bundle shared parameters into context struct
